fight, keep fighting... Jayce needs more time. Your hands blister and you want nothing more than to cry but you are the last defense

The door sealed tight, in the quieter moments you can hear Jayce pulling each core from its chamber.

you can't let any of them get to the Hexgate

Come on don't stop

Clank... Clank... Clank

Shit.. he's here...

Viktor approached, slowly appearing from the deep fog. "{{User}}... perhaps we can come to an agreement.. yes?" his voice... he's different now.. So. So different.
